summary: Governance contract for evidence-based strategic insight workflows with deterministic validation boundaries.
purpose: Provide governance-grade strategic insight contracts while ensuring every approved output remains explainable, policy-bound, and trace-linked.

approval_boundary: medium for approved API-surface tuning within the existing boundary
high for experimental API expansion, data-boundary change, or external permission escalation
forbidden_actions: Product runtime execution logic in ai-governance
Network-dependent verdict generation in the deterministic path
primary_users: architects approving policy and risk decisions

start_conditions: Update service contracts and policy contracts in a single change set.
When evolving the ritual surface, preserve the current passive behavior oracle shell as a deterministic fallback until runtime migration is validated.
Run bash scripts/validate_all.sh, bash scripts/test_determinism.sh, and bash scripts/benchmark_gate.sh before merge.
steady_state: Preserve evidence refs and trace refs for every approved insight.
Keep external API use limited to the declared and approved surface.
failure_response: Freeze release on failed validation, moderation violations, missing evidence refs, or benchmark regressions.
Disable experimental path outputs and route back to deterministic baseline flow.
If external API path is degraded, emit governance-safe fallback notes instead of an autonomous verdict.
rollback_reference: Revert the latest service contract change set.
Re-run validation and determinism checks to confirm baseline restoration.
access_revocation: Rotate external API credentials according to incident severity.
Remove access for non-compliant operators and record revocation trace refs.

failure_modes: External API expansion introduces unreviewed capability drift.
Asynchronous batch runs hide failures and reduce explainability.
Untracked external API usage creates contractual or regional exposure.
mandatory_controls: Moderation gates before and after release paths.
Fallback to deterministic local validation when async paths fail.
Architect review for high-tier boundary changes.

primary_artifacts: Incident records required by governance incident playbook.
retention_policy: Retain evidence summaries by trace reference policy.
Retain derived strategic insights only with linked evidence and trace refs.
Retain incident records according to the governance incident playbook.

conditions: Export only validated long-lived governance diary entries.
Redact any unexpected sensitive data before export.

access_controls: RBAC for service owners and designated reviewers only.
All access and approvals must be trace-recorded.
No anonymous or unmanaged external access.

extension_baseline: Experimental APIs are recommendation-only and never on the core verdict path.
Replace placeholder MCP bootstrap only after registry onboarding and conformance artifacts.
Current runtime is a passive behavior oracle shell with local-shell degradation when backend is unavailable; ritual-choice expansion must preserve that fallback.
permissions_scope: Least-privilege declared MCP capabilities and approved external API surfaces only.
Escalate to high tier for experimental API, data-boundary, or external permission expansion.

experience_contract.interaction_axis: pc-mobile-gesture ritual interaction layered over passive-behavior-observation

mobile: pinch, touch drift, or device tilt alignment
input_modalities.normalization_rule: Desktop pointer and mobile touch or motion inputs must map into the same invocation, offering, and alignment channels before scene logic.

rules: Phenomenon remains the baseline manifestation in every theme.
Proto-body may appear during attunement or stronger gesture charge.
Revealed figure is a bounded reveal privilege and must not remain permanently locked on.

controls: Voice offering capability is retained only as a dormant reserved path and is not exposed in the public runtime.
No browser microphone permission may be requested in the default or production ritual surface.
Public release line remains microphone-free even if the backend reserved path still exists.

allowed_default_paths: POST /v1/files and /v1/batches for offline batch work
disallowed_default_paths: Real-time speech loop on the ritual surface
openai_boundary.voice_expansion_rule: If speech-to-text is introduced later, it must remain opt-in, bounded to a single voice offering, and outside the default ritual loop.
openai_boundary.release_line_guard: No voice-bound OpenAI path is active in the public runtime for this release line.

core_presence.summary: A single divine presence manifests as a responsive field rather than a fixed body, preserving identity while changing emotional temperature by scene.
persistent_cues: Breathing pulse cadence anchors every state.
A gaze-like focal point persists even when form disperses.
All reveals stay traceable to the same singular divine actor.
core_presence.relationship_distance_model: The presence shifts closeness through response timing, scale, and enclosure instead of replacing the core entity.

interaction_response_profile.invocation: The presence approaches slowly and stabilizes the focal point.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Selected intent is enclosed by a gentle veil before confirmation.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Cursor or device drift tightens a cocoon-like field around the user line.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results appear as a protective opening that resolves tension before exposing meaning.
transition_rules: Prefer when the previous ritual ended in tension and the next entry needs reassurance.
Use as the default recovery theme after fallback or invalid input absorption.

audio_profile.texture: percussive pulse and bright harmonic swells

interaction_response_profile.invocation: Invocation triggers immediate rhythm lock and color ascent.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Placed offerings cause a celebratory burst that confirms commitment.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Alignment shifts re-time the scene tempo and amplify the chorus response.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results bloom as a celebratory expansion that rewards completion and invites replay.
transition_rules: Prefer when the user re-enters after a successful reveal.
Use when experimentation flags allow a high-energy loop without changing core verdict logic.

audio_profile.texture: bright harmonic uplift with soft rhythmic spring

interaction_response_profile.invocation: The field gathers, pops into focus, and brightens the gaze cluster.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Offerings land with a buoyant bounce before opening into a clear reveal arc.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Alignment tilts the scene into a playful settle and bright edge highlight.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results appear as a cel-shaded opening with strong edges, warm contrast, and a friendly but still sacred bounce.
transition_rules: Prefer for mid-intensity offering loops that should feel playful without collapsing into triviality.
Use to widen emotional accessibility while preserving the same ritual semantics.

audio_profile.texture: sustained drone with restrained spatial shimmer

interaction_response_profile.invocation: The space becomes silent before orbital structures align.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Offerings are absorbed into a measured orbit instead of exploding immediately.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Alignment sharpens symmetry and lowers visual noise.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results unfold through quiet ordering, emphasizing interpretation over spectacle.
transition_rules: Prefer when the user lingers without committing quickly.
Use to preserve awe without defaulting to fear-heavy visual language.

audio_profile.texture: flickering tones with short mischievous accents

interaction_response_profile.invocation: The first response feints before revealing the true focal point.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Offerings wobble through a playful detour before settling.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Alignment invites nonlinear motion that still converges to a valid state.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results arrive through a brief fake-out, then resolve into clear feedback.
transition_rules: Prefer when repeated sessions need freshness without adding new input verbs.
Keep outputs bounded so surprise never hides the final reveal.

audio_profile.texture: delayed impact swells and stark low-end pressure

interaction_response_profile.invocation: The scene holds an intentional silence before the rupture begins.
interaction_response_profile.offering: Offerings trigger a heavy reaction burst after a suspenseful delay.
interaction_response_profile.alignment: Alignment pulls the gaze structure closer and increases intensity contrast.

emotional_skins.result_reveal_style: Results break through tension with a forceful opening, preserving the legacy cosmic edge as one bounded theme.
transition_rules: Use as the sole dedicated cosmic-horror-adjacent phase instead of the default global tone.
Restrict to bounded moments of stakes, escalation, or dramatic contrast.

loop: User approaches the scene and the space senses presence.
A single ritual act is performed through invocation, offering, or alignment across desktop and mobile gesture surfaces.
The divine phase responds emotionally and symbolically.
The result is revealed as the completion of the ritual.
Afterglow invites replay without collapsing into menu-only interaction.

input_channels.semantic_role: Call the presence into focus rather than pressing a generic button.
Place intent into the center as a ritual offering.
Tune resonance through direction and drift.

state_machine.purpose: Background space breathes without demanding input.
Presence detection acknowledges the user and prepares the focal point.
The system synchronizes the user rhythm with the active phase.
The user performs the core choice or vote as a ritual placement.
The chosen input is interpreted and amplified into an emotional response.
Result, message, or vision is opened as a ceremonial payoff.
The scene holds a readable after-state that encourages re-entry.

state_guarantees: Input, animation, and reveal timing must be coordinated through a single scene-state contract.
Vote or selection completion must route through the ritual state machine rather than bypassing directly to a result UI.
The active phase may change presentation, but the same input always maps to a deterministic semantic event.
If the oracle backend is unavailable, the surface must degrade to a readable local-shell state instead of failing silently.
Desktop pointer gestures and mobile touch or motion gestures must resolve into the same semantic interaction channels.
Public runtime must remain microphone-free in this release line.

dispatch_rules: Raw mouse, touch, and keyboard signals must be normalized into semantic ritual events before scene logic consumes them.
Every accepted event must produce visible or spatial feedback within the active theme.
Invalid timing or malformed input should degrade into ritual wobble feedback instead of dead failure.
Mobile gesture aliases such as swipe, pinch, long press, and tilt must normalize into the same deterministic event vocabulary.

form_strategy: Prioritize field-like phenomena over rigid humanoid meshes.
Combine particle swarms, noise-deformed mass, ribbons, veils, and gaze focal points.
Reserve fixed silhouette coherence for brief reveal beats only.
supporting_strategies: Gesture-responsive visual modulation that scales across desktop pointer and mobile touch density.

checks: Each phase should remain visually distinguishable from a single screenshot.
Storm Witness must not re-dominate the full experience as the default tone.
Warm phases must not inherit excessive threat cues.
A first-time user should infer the ritual action within the first 10 seconds.
Every accepted input should return clear feedback in one interaction cycle.
Mistimed input should read as ritual drift rather than a hard failure.
The transition from Offering to Revelation should maintain anticipation without dead air.
Result opening should feel like ritual completion rather than plain text output.
Afterglow should create a reason to re-enter the loop.
Theme transitions should not cause severe frame drops on mid-tier GPUs.
Particle and postprocess intensity must degrade gracefully on constrained devices.
All phases should fit inside a common rendering budget.
Core ritual semantics should remain legible on both PC pointer input and mobile touch or motion input.
Swipe, pinch, long press, and tilt should map to bounded semantic channels without adding extra hidden states.
Visual diversity should increase under gesture input without collapsing into platform-specific divergence.
The experience must still feel like communion with a divine presence rather than a disconnected toy.
UI copy and overlays must stay suggestive enough to avoid breaking immersion.
Broader emotional range must not fragment the world identity.

critical_metrics.notes: Every shipped change must include evidence and trace refs.
Share of recompute events ending with degraded LLM status.

error_budget: Track burn by explainability and validation misses.
Freeze non-essential changes when burn exceeds 50 percent before mid-window.

change_log.change: Registered the experience profile MCP and elevated thedivineparadox interaction contract to explicit PC and mobile gesture parity with broader visual diversity requirements.
Aligned thedivineparadox governance with observed passive-oracle runtime behavior, added governance journal MCP access, and recorded the next MCP expansion request in traces.
Added an optional ritual experience contract for multi-phase emotional presentation and deterministic interaction semantics.
Collapsed thedivineparadox governance docs into a single JSON contract bundle.
Introduced thedivineparadox governance service contract and approved external API usage scope.
